title: lycopodium clavatum var. robustius
intro: Lycopodium clavatum var. robustius, commonly known as the robust club moss, is a variety of the club moss plant that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The robust club moss is also believed to have health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Lycopodium clavatum var. robustium include tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
